articles.title: Automotive Bootloader
articles.excerpt: How to update firmware in the field. Dual-bank updates and memory jumping.

articles.title: AUTOSAR Masterclass: Part 1 - The Foundation
articles.excerpt: What is AUTOSAR? Why does the automotive industry depend on it? Learn the philosophy and the massive layered architecture behind modern vehicles.

articles.title: AUTOSAR Masterclass: Part 2 - ASW & VFB
articles.excerpt: Software Components (SWCs), Ports, and the Virtual Functional Bus. Learn how AUTOSAR enables hardware-independent software design.

articles.title: AUTOSAR Masterclass: Part 3 - The Glue (RTE)
articles.excerpt: Master the Runtime Environment (RTE). The vital middleware that transforms virtual connections into real C code and handles task scheduling.

articles.title: AUTOSAR Masterclass: Part 4 - ARXML Deep Dive
articles.excerpt: Decode ARXML files. Learn the XML structure behind AUTOSAR configurations and see how tools parse them into executable code.

articles.title: AUTOSAR Masterclass: Part 5 - Generators & Tools
articles.excerpt: How AUTOSAR tools convert configurations into production code. Code generation, compilation, and linking in the AUTOSAR toolchain.

articles.title: AUTOSAR Masterclass: Part 6 - Real-World Integration
articles.excerpt: Hands-on: Integrating AUTOSAR into existing ECU firmware. Best practices, debugging, and deployment to real vehicles.

articles.title: AUTOSAR Stacks: The Complete Layered Architecture
articles.excerpt: Dive deep into AUTOSAR stack organization. Application, BSW, RTE, and Hardware. Understand how layers communicate.

articles.title: Embedded C Basics: Part 1 - Registers and Memory
articles.excerpt: Start your embedded journey. Learn how to read hardware registers, manage memory directly, and understand the CPU architecture.

articles.title: Embedded C Basics: Part 2 - GPIO and Bitwise Operations
articles.excerpt: Master GPIO programming and bitwise operations. Control pins, read sensors, and work with hardware masks in embedded systems.

articles.title: Embedded C Basics: Part 3 - Interrupts and ISRs
articles.excerpt: Understand interrupts: how to write ISRs, avoid context switches, and design interrupt-driven systems safely.

articles.title: Embedded C Basics: Part 4 - Timers and PWM
articles.excerpt: Work with timers and PWM to create precise timing, control motors, and generate signals at exact frequencies.

articles.title: Embedded C Basics: Part 5 - Serial Communication (UART/SPI)
articles.excerpt: Communicate with the outside world using UART, SPI, and I2C. Learn data transmission, framing, and synchronization.

articles.title: Embedded C Basics: Part 6 - Building a Real Firmware Project
articles.excerpt: Hands-on: Build a complete firmware project from scratch. Linker scripts, memory layout, makefiles, and debugging techniques.

articles.title: Flash EEPROM Emulation in AUTOSAR (FEE Overview)
articles.excerpt: How AUTOSAR manages persistent data. Deep dive into FEE (Flash EEPROM Emulation), wear leveling, and data integrity.

articles.title: Hardware Security Module (HSM) in Automotive
articles.excerpt: Secure your ECU. Learn how Hardware Security Modules protect cryptographic keys, verify firmware signatures, and prevent tampering.
